name: tab-yeet
description: Browser extension: copy tab URLs with transforms and formatting

scripts.lint:chrome: npm run stage:chrome && web-ext lint --source-dir build/chrome
scripts.build:chrome: npm run stage:chrome && web-ext build --source-dir build/chrome --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts --filename "{name}-{version}-chrome.zip" --overwrite-dest
scripts.build:ext: npm run build:firefox && npm run build:chrome
scripts.ci: npm test && npm run lint:firefox && npm run build:firefox && npm run build:chrome
